Simply my favorite Tom Hanks film, potentially my favorite film of all time. While lack of awareness/raw intelligence eludes Forrest all his life, it highlights the blessing of naivety that some of us wish we could regain when we were children. Despite all the heartbreak and loss Forrest experiences, it never stops him from moving forward onto his next journey the world laid out for him. I think the world would be a better place if we all just adopted some more Forrest Gump in our lives.
“You know, Life is like a box of Chocolates, you never know what you’re gonna get.” “You can tell a lot of a person by their shoes, where they come from, where they’ve been.”-Forrest Gump

Forrest gump, a man of many stories, that he doesn't even know what a brillant mind he truly is, despite his obviously told iq. Story filled with many emotiins in between scenes, which makes you feel the emotion with him.

A charming story with lessons of simplicity, devotion, and inspiring capacities with the iconic Forrest Gump. It was a heart-warming story fit for a family. Was it perhaps slow enough where I needed 3 nights to finish? Possibly. But as a relaxed watch, it made my Sunday-Wednesday splendid. -pookster
The most quotable movie ever made. A film as iconic as the main character.

This is the 3rd time I have watched this movie. The first time I watched it on a Saturday morning during the school year when I was 14…now I am 35. This movie does what a movie is supposed to do. It tells a story, makes you care about the characters and most importantly. This movie makes you FEEL something. It’s just a good ‘ol story that makes you feel a wide array of emotions. This time it left me feeling peaceful and calm. Jenny chose a life of chasing the wind and never catching exactly why she was hoping for…until she caught up with life’s ONLY guarantee, her demise. Forest’s character remains curious, adventurous and ready to take on life’s many inevitable challenges. Now THIS is how movies should tell a story!!!
5/5 PERFECT. Although as some might say this movie is boring and overrated, well.. OF COURSE it is.. it's a masterpiece.
It’s a great movie. Run Forrest run to see it!
Hilarious, deep, heartwarming, with a tremendous soundtrack

95/100 What a classic

Ez a film számomra a mozi esszenciája. 🎞️ Nem csak nézed, hanem együtt lélegzel a történelemmel. Zemeckis rendezése és Tom Hanks játéka olyan elegyet alkot, ami egyszerre facsarja ki a szívedet és tölt fel végtelen életigenléssel. ❤️ Amikor a tollpihe száll a végén... az maga a filmművészeti varázslat. Ezt a filmet nem elég látni, ezt érezni kell. For me, this movie is the very essence of cinema. 🎞️ You don't just watch it; you breathe with history. Zemeckis's direction and Tom Hanks's performance create a blend that breaks your heart and fills you with infinite optimism all at once. ❤️ When that feather floats at the end... that is pure cinematic magic. You don't just see this movie, you have to feel it.
A film that got me so moved thanks to the emotion from Tom Hanks and the story. I am ashamed I did not see this movie sooner because it really is great.
Such a heartfelt story that has love, heartbreak, and tragedy but all ends with a happy ending albeit a sad one.
I loved this movie so much, its such a classic, I love the character development and the people he meets on the way, makes it feel like you are simulating someone's life

A film that genuinely puts a whole other perspective of life into your head. The story of a man who in theory should amount to nothing, has one of the most significant lives one could possibly conceive. I have never been moved by a film in this way before or since. I’ve watched it several times and it never ever fails to take my breath away and give me a sense that everything in life works out in one way or another. There is no fancy way of describing this film without saying how it makes the viewer feel, and that’s how it makes me feel.

Forrest is the loveliest gentleman ever. Maybe the conventional tests have deemed his IQ to be 75, but those numbers are not going to stop him from being a national footballer, an honorary soldier, a national ping-ponger, and a national icon. He was an amazing lover and Jenny did not deserve him or his money. Most importantly, he was a great dad. His spirit and optimism ever-soaring, like a feather, so high. Just majestic, and Tom Hanks and Forrest Gump are a duo to be loved, adored, and cherished. The 90s aesthetic techniques and magic of romance in the clips, the scenic shots, the absolutely beautiful music woven in, and the humility of it all simply presents a delicious treat—a must-watch.
Perfect film. When u rewatch it as an adult u realize how deep it is with Jenny being the villain & forest had a life more worthy after her See More See Less
This is the best movie ever and the saddest movie ever 😭😭😭😭

Cons: There are honestly no flaws that I can think of for this movie. Pros: This movie is charming and fun. The perfect mix of humor and heart. Sometimes it had me cackling, and other times it pulled on my heartstrings. Forrest is a lovable lead who sees the world from an innocent point of of view. The type of guy you'd like to be friends with, and it feels like he's your friend as he tells you the story of his life including both the highs and lows. The film is set during the 1950s through the 1980s, and it's fun to see Forrest interact with and be involved with the major historical events that marked those time periods from Elvis's rise to fame to the protests against the Vietnam War. This movie is a classic and is 100% worth the hype. It's the type of movie you need to watch at least once in your life. It will have you laughing and rooting for a guy that the world doesn't deserve, but the world needs more of.
"This film broke my heart, I was deeply moved.. a true masterclass."

Forrest Gump is a simple yet deeply nice and heart-touching movie. It doesn’t try to be complicated or overly dramatic, but that’s exactly what makes it special. Forrest sees the world with honesty and kindness, and through his journey, the film shows how purity of heart can survive in a harsh and confusing world. Every phase of his life carries emotion friendship, love, loss, and hope all told in a very gentle way. The movie makes you smile, makes you emotional, and leaves you feeling warm inside. Forrest Gump reminds us that you don’t need to be the smartest or strongest person to live a meaningful life sometimes, having a good heart is enough.

Forrest Gump is one of my favorite movies of all time. This whole movie is heartwarming and wholesome. It can get emotional, funny, shocking and well done. The plot, characters are fantastic. 10 out of 10 easily.
The brilliance between the movie is that how the protagonist can convey his motivation through the screen. The plot structure is one-of-a-kind. One of the best movie of all time.
75% huh, this movie needs to be 100%
I’m so incredibly glad they didn’t ruin the emotional moments with any overused music. The entire movie was a masterpiece and went through every emotion with grace and power.

There’s so many layers to this story and i think you can start understanding each layer when you reach 13 years old. The music, the dialogues and the scenery shows that simple movie can be masterpieces when it’s done in a proper way. I’ll recommend it and watch it a thousand times everytime i can.
LOVE LOVE LOVE <3 why haven't i seen this sooner? all time favorite i think.

One of the best movies ever made. A pop cultural iconic movie.

What we both agreed on is that Forrest is a character who teaches by being. He doesn’t try to change people. He simply stays kind. In a world full of noise, his presence is what stays with you. His story isn’t about triumph in the traditional sense, it’s about resilience, and about loving people even when they don’t love you back the way you expect.

Suprised it didn't get 100% it's Forrest Gump one of the all time greats. It's funny and heartfelt and makes you shed more that a few tears. This film has a special place in my heart and any one else who watches it.
I have to give the performances a 10/10 but the fact that I rated it 4.5 because there is a lot going on in the movie so that is why I rated it 4.5 so but great movie over all

Yeah, it’s gonna be on the TV just quiet enough to have your full and direct attention during every Thanksgiving and Christmas as you’re chatting with your family in the living room. It’s comforting and well-worn like your old shoes you only get out to go to your grandma’s, and Tom Hanks is as wonderful as ever.
If you’re looking for an absolute classic, then you’ve come to the right movie.
An amazing movie! Tom Hanks’ role and charisma was crucial to the movies performance.

An absolute classic. (Spoiler Alert) This movie tells the story of a man in the mid to late 1900’s with a disability. He accomplished incredible things through out his life, including fighting in the military, opening a business and receiving many awards. He becomes famous and finds and fights for the love of his life, Jenny. This movie is the perfect example of not judging a book by its cover, as young Forrest was beaten up and mocked as a kid only to achieve more than his bullies ever did. This is an amazing movie, I definitely would recommend it.
This movie is one of the best simply incredible
good acting and sometimes funny but its got a weird plot and it certainly didn't deserve an Oscar. Over all not bad but not the best.
This film was a major part of my childhood, its amazing how they tell history through the film. The best of Tom Hanks
